//: Root-level Vercel config so a repo-ROOT deployment builds the Astro marketing site in clients/website. Preferred setup is still to set the Vercel project's Root Directory to 'clients/website' (which uses clients/website/vercel.json instead); this file is the belt-and-suspenders fallback so a default repo-root deploy also works. Keep the redirects/headers here in sync with clients/website/vercel.json.
